title: Examination authority
doc_html:
§1660.6. Examination authority

            The commissioner may cause an examination, as prescribed by the provisions of Chapter 8 of this Title, of any pharmacy services administrative organization when in the opinion of the commissioner it is necessary for such an examination to be made.

            Acts 2021, No. 192, §1.
doc_text:
§1660.6.  Examination authority
The commissioner may cause an examination, as prescribed by the provisions of
Chapter 8 of this Title, of any pharmacy services administrative organization when in the
opinion of the commissioner it is necessary for such an examination to be made.
Acts 2021, No. 192, §1.
